name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for this platform instance

host.title: Processor Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of the StormAudio ISP processor

port.title: Port
port.description: TCP port for the StormAudio ISP API (default: 23)

volumeFloor.title: Volume Floor (dB)
volumeFloor.description: Minimum volume level in dB, must be less than volumeCeiling (default: -100)

volumeControl.title: Volume Control
volumeControl.description: HomeKit accessory type used for volume control. Fan is recommended — it avoids 'turn off all lights' muting your processor.

wakeTimeout.title: Wake Timeout (seconds)
wakeTimeout.description: How long to wait for the processor to boot after a power-on command (default: 90). Older models may need a higher value.

commandInterval.title: Command Interval (ms)
commandInterval.description: Minimum milliseconds between commands sent to the processor (default: 100). Values below 85 may cause dropped commands.

inputs.title: Input Aliases
inputs.description: Map of input ID (as string) to display name, e.g. { "3": "TV", "5": "PS5" }
